the-loop-academy-wiki/tempo.title: Tempo
the-loop-academy-wiki/tempo.content:
Tempo
Tempo is the speed of a piece of music, measured in Beats Per Minute (BPM).
For reference, a clock ticking once a second is 60 BPM, as there are 60 seconds in one minute.
In Brazilian Zouk
To see how this relates to Brazilian Zouk music, see BPM Ranges in Brazilian Zouk ~~REVIEW~~.
